name: forgeailab
description: ForgeAILab Claude Code plugins. spark = the board-driven AI MVP workflow (planner / implementer / evaluator skills over a docs/spark spec workspace).

plugins.name: spark
plugins.description: spark's 17-skill workflow: /spark:start conducts the whole pipeline (proposal + visual design + EARS specs + tasks.md, then — once approved — scaffold and build), /spark:board-review is the approval gate, /spark:capture-feedback turns live feedback into tasks, plus the evaluator and pack tooling. The planning phases ship as references inside /spark:start.
